creator: quetzal@zone3000.net
text:
New version of openfire.

=================== Changelog ========================

Openfire Bug Fixes

    Fixed out of memory problem produced by XMPPDecoder.
    Fixed out of memory problem produced by XMLLightweightParser.
    HTTP Binding no longer depends upon /resources/spank directory.
    Modified SSO authorization to use uppercase when comparing principals.

Openfire Connection Manager Module

    Fixed out of memory problem produced by XMPPDecoder.
    Fixed out of memory problem produced by XMLLightweightParser.

=================== Changelog ========================

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
